textByHash.f7adf05ed3a04b9bc16b825e18343bef445765b6: Are you interested in buying or selling a helmet?
textByHash.3f327dc71494c1e73fa4aad62e405a0390d1e86f: Now how could you know about that, I wonder? Mind you, I don't have it anymore.
textByHash.0df5852530d342752eb58199444da293814bb367: I gave it as a present to my brother Ivor when I visited our outpost northwest of Camelot.
textByHash.745fff61830644f5737d6a0271b259302b9eb9b1: Well, actually I hid it in his bed so it would nip him. It was a bit of a surprise gift.
textByHash.0b55e3ec1fb2a104b7975a11182d097be714e857: Well, come back if you change your mind.
